enableLocalHelp: Conexão direta ao inversor via TCP/Protobuf na porta 10081
dtuHost: Endereço IP / nome do host do DTU
dtuHostHelp: Endereço IP ou nome do host do DTU integrado do inversor
dataIntervalHelp: Seconds between data requests (0-300). Set 0 for fastest possible (no delay). The DTU pushes real-time data via persistent connection.
slowPollFactorHelp: Config and alarms are queried every Nth data cycle. Default: 6.
enableCloudRelay: Cloud relay (forward data to Hoymiles Cloud)
enableCloudRelayHelp: When enabled, the adapter forwards real-time data to the Hoymiles Cloud on behalf of the DTU. This allows fast local polling without blocking cloud updates.
cloudRelayWarning: Warning: Cloud and local connection are both active but cloud relay is disabled. The local connection blocks the DTU from uploading to the cloud. Enable cloud relay or expect missing/delayed cloud data.
hostInfo: Leave empty = auto-discovery on adapter start. You can also find the DTU IP in your router's DHCP client list (device name: DTUBI-*).
hostRequired: O endereço IP ou nome do host é obrigatório
enableCloudHelp: Consultar dados da nuvem Hoymiles S-Miles (energia diária/mensal/anual)
cloudUserRequired: O endereço de email é obrigatório
inverterSelectHelp: Search and select connected inverters. If empty, the first found inverter is used.
cloudDtuSerialHelp: For multiple inverters in your account: enter the DTU serial number to match the correct one. Leave empty for single inverter setups.
cloudInfo: A conexão na nuvem utiliza a API Hoymiles S-Miles. Energia diária, mensal e anual, bem como economias de CO2, são carregadas a partir da nuvem.
